title: Velvet santal
body_html:
Notes:
Vanilla
Sugar cane
Amber
Oud
Tonka beans


Vibe:
Soft, elegant, and effortlessly luxurious.
This is for someone who loves refinement without heavines a gentle kind of luxury that feels feminine, comforting, and polished. It’s not loud or overpowering; it whispers elegance. Perfect for those who want a sophisticated scent that feels graceful, cozy, and beautifully put together.

When to Wear:
Ramadan day to evening wear
Iftar gatherings where you want something light yet memorable
Intimate family moments and casual chic outings
Ideal for anyone who wants luxury in a soft, feminine way without heavy oud
